blended.narrative: Belleayre Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 49°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 58°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: light rain showers, highs of 24°F.
